seoTitle: Muja vs Mulataga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Muja and Mulataga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Muja and Mulataga.
heading: Muja vs Mulataga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Muja, Western Australia and Mulataga, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mulataga has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Muja (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Muja or Mulataga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Muja has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Mulataga scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Muja scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Mulataga scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Muja or Mulataga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mulataga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
